'''namuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiehouyu|xiehouyu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiehouyu|xiehouyu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| namuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næmiwith|næmiwith]] || [[word:næmiwij|næmiwij]] || [[word:næmiwish|næmiwish]] || [[word:næmiwi|næmiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:namumuwuth|namumuwuth]] || [[word:namumuwuj|namumuwuj]] || [[word:namumuwush|namumuwush]] || [[word:namumuwu|namumuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:namuwuth|namuwuth]] || [[word:namuwuj|namuwuj]] || [[word:namuwush|namuwush]] || [[word:namuwu|namuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:namufwuth|namufwuth]] || [[word:namufwuj|namufwuj]] || [[word:namufwush|namufwush]] || [[word:namufwuf|namufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:namuwuthu|namuwuthu]] || [[word:namuwuju|namuwuju]] || [[word:namuwushu|namuwushu]] || [[word:namuwuku|namuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:namuwuth|namuwuth]] || [[word:namuwuj|namuwuj]] || [[word:namuwush|namuwush]] || [[word:namuwu|namuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:namuwuthul|namuwuthul]] || [[word:namuwujul|namuwujul]] || [[word:namuwushul|namuwushul]] || [[word:namuwukul|namuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:namuwuthuthu|namuwuthuthu]] || [[word:namuwujuju|namuwujuju]] || [[word:namuwushushu|namuwushushu]] || [[word:namuwuku|namuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:namuwuthun|namuwuthun]] || [[word:namuwujun|namuwujun]] || [[word:namuwushun|namuwushun]] || [[word:namuwukun|namuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:namuwuthuoro|namuwuthuoro]] || [[word:namuwujuoro|namuwujuoro]] || [[word:namuwushuoro|namuwushuoro]] || [[word:namuwukuoro|namuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
